title: Who Wrote It?
description: AI can write texts that look like a human wrote them. But sometimes it makes things up!
rules: Read each sentence and decide: is it a TRUE FACT written by a human, or something MADE UP by AI?

questions.text: The Margherita pizza was invented in Naples in 1889 by pizza maker Raffaele Esposito in honor of Queen Margherita.
questions.explanation: This is a true historical fact! You can find it in history books. 📚

questions.text: Dolphins can fly for short distances when they are very happy, reaching up to 3 meters above the water.
questions.explanation: FALSE! AI made this up. Dolphins jump but they can't fly! This is called an AI 'hallucination'. 🐬

questions.text: The Sun is a star and the closest star to Earth. Its light takes about 8 minutes to reach us.
questions.explanation: Correct! This is a verifiable scientific fact. ☀️

questions.text: Leonardo da Vinci painted the Mona Lisa using a secret technique that included diamond dust mixed with the colors.
questions.explanation: MADE UP by AI! Leonardo used the 'sfumato' technique, not diamond dust. AI mixes real facts with inventions! 🎨

questions.text: Water boils at 100 degrees Celsius at sea level.
